hooks.command:
node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.command||'';const isMigration=/migrat|schema[\s-_]?push|prisma.*deploy|prisma.*dev|knex.*latest|knex.*migrate|psql.*-f|db.*push|alter\s+table|drop\s+table|drop\s+column/i.test(cmd);if(isMigration){process.stderr.write('
⚠ MIGRATION HOOK TRIGGERED
'+'━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
'+'Command : '+cmd+'
'+'
What this will do:
'+'  - Modify the database schema on the connected RDS instance
'+'  - Changes may be irreversible (column drops, type changes)
'+'  - Affects ALL branches sharing this database
'+'
Do NOT approve unless you have:
'+'  1. Read the migration file and know every change it makes
'+'  2. Confirmed there is a rollback plan
'+'  3. Verified this is the correct environment (dev/staging/prod)
'+'━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
');process.exit(2);}}catch(e){}});"
